plugins.prepareCmd: npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version && npx vsce package --out bc-dev-stack-${nextRelease.version}.vsix
plugins.publishCmd: npx vsce publish --packagePath bc-dev-stack-${nextRelease.version}.vsix && oras push ghcr.io/dam-pav/bc-dev-stack:${nextRelease.version} --artifact-type application/vnd.microsoft.vscode.extension bc-dev-stack-${nextRelease.version}.vsix:application/vsix
